entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency trading platform offering spot trading, simple and advanced trade interfaces, fiat pairs, API access, wallets, OTC services, and related exchange products.
entity.notes: The official About page states that EXMO.com was founded in 2014 and operates as a global cryptocurrency trading platform. The launch date uses a year-level approximation because the first-party source states only the year.

evidence.title: About EXMO.com crypto exchange
evidence.notes: First-party About page states that EXMO.com was founded in 2014 and is a global cryptocurrency trading platform with active trading tools and services.

evidence.title: EXMO official exchange website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website exposes active markets, simple and advanced trading, API access, wallets, and current exchange services.

evidence.title: EXMO exchange discovery entries
evidence.notes: Secondary exchange registry corroborates EXMO identity; duplicate registry rows are consolidated into one entity.
